title: DeployEvidence
description: The Release Engineer's deploy-gate evidence for a FEATURE, persisted as features/<F>/deploy-evidence.json by lakebase-sftdd-deploy. It records that the increment was deployed to a target, is reachable, and passed its feature-verify run against the RUNNING app. The deploy gate approves only when this artifact exists, is conformant, and records reachable=true AND verify.passed=true (the working-software teeth).

target.description: The deploy target name (e.g. local) from deploy-targets.yaml.

url.description: The reachable URL the app answered on (base_url + health_path).

reachable.description: True when the app answered ANY HTTP response within the ready timeout.

passed.description: True when the feature-verify command exited 0 against the running app.

command.description: The feature-verify command that was run (from the target's verify field).

summary.description: Short human-readable summary of the verify outcome.

lakebase_branch.description: The Lakebase branch the deployed app ran against (a per-story experiment branch, or unset for the feature-branch per-sprint deploy).

deployed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the evidence was recorded.
